name: @forwardimpact/summit
description: Model team capability as a system — staffing decisions backed by evidence, not intuition.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: A post-mortem surfaces the same skill gap that caused the last incident — nobody saw it before staffing.
jobs.bigHire: make staffing decisions I can defend by seeing what each role requires.
jobs.littleHire: spot capability gaps and check whether a candidate fills them.
jobs.competesWith: résumé screening; gut feel; copying a team that seems to work; accepting gaps as inevitable

forces.push: Capability gaps appear as incidents, never in advance.
forces.pull: Confidence that a staffing change strengthens the team as a system.
forces.habit: Hiring on résumés and gut rather than team composition analysis.

jobs.firedWhen: the skill taxonomy drifts from actual roles; or a hiring freeze removes staffing pressure.
